notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Ownership: actioned all three triggers, named explicit escalation criteria, distinguished routine from non-routine. Composure: 'I read his tone as brief, not hostile, and matched the brevity' is exact application of Chapter 2's posture. Honest admission: model 'I don't have the regulatory detail to answer properly' line, identical to chapter's exemplar. Failure response: textbook own/fix/extract, calendar habit added, no repeat apologies. Long view: 'Open item for your return' on covering-PM bar shows the long-view posture (asking the right question for next time, not litigating this time) without grievance. Top of the rubric. Cites the chapter's own framing without performing it.
